text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket has left her mark on the Twinkle
Series, achieving results to be proud of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm reflecting on everything we've
achieved on the way to this major turning point...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I have an idea!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Why don't we go watch the Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So Ticket and I head out to see the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The impressive lineup of participants gets ready
behind the gates. Winning Ticket's eyes sparkle
as she watches them enter.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa, amazing! So these are the Classics'
strongest racers!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Who's gonna win? This is so exciting, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The gates open, and the race begins!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: GOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racers run across the turf with immense
energy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, at the fourth corner, a fierce battle for
the lead breaks out as the racers begin their final
sprint!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa! Amazing, amazing—this is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the heartfelt cries of the fans ring out, the
exhilarating Japanese Derby comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some of the racers are crying, while others are
exchanging firm handshakes. It's been an exciting
and emotional experience for everyone involved,
and somehow...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gwaaahhh! I'm... so... touched! AAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: DERBYYY! You're the BEEEEST!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Winning Ticket seems every bit as emotional as
the runners on the track!
choice_data_list: You really love the Derby, huh?
You really love the Derby, huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I mean, it's the race I always dreamed of...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And on top of that, I've been there myself, so it
brings back those memories of running with
Taishin and Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I can feel something squeezing inside my chest,
you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the moment of her debut, Winning Ticket
had made the Japanese Derby her biggest goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she made her dream come true. On that
amazing day, she put on an intense performance
that left its mark on the hearts of countless
people.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We've been through so much, huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly looks toward me as if remembering
something out of the blue.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ah! That's right! I wanted to tell you something
today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
A loooot of things have happened since the
Twinkle Series started!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But you've always believed in me, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Even when I lost confidence...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Now... I'm scared of running in the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And when Hayahide and Taishin said I wasn't their
rival.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What is it about me now that's so different
compared to when I ran the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Even when I was a bumbling mess of doubts, you
always believed in me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You always told me to go for it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So thank you for trusting in me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a spark of determination in Winning
Ticket's eyes—she looks more serious than I've
ever seen her.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You know what? When I ran in the Arima Kinen, I
realized I wanna keep running in all kinds of other
races!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanna feel the excitement! And I wanna make
everyone else feel excited too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I want to be the kind of racer that can inspire
people!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So there it is, Trainer! Are you with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back when we got started, Winning Ticket was
just a beginner with her sights set on nothing but
the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But over the course of these three years, that
clumsy runner made it through her share of
hardships and grew into a dependable
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: To run races that inspire people to dream...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and I are about to begin a whole
new story together!
